nasb.text: a land for which the Lord your God cares; the eyes of the Lord your God are always on it, from the beginning even to the end of the year.

esv.text: a land that the Lord your God cares for. The eyes of the Lord your God are always upon it, from the beginning of the year to the end of the year.

cnv.text: 就是耶和華你的　神眷顧的地；從歲首到年終，耶和華你的　神的眼目常常眷顧這地。

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华从岁首到年终时时看顾那里。
